ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "locus" TEXT /* Genomic location of the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source database of the gene annotation */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Long name or description of the gene */,
  "GO" TEXT /* Gene Ontology ID */,
  "GOterm" TEXT /* Gene Ontology term */,
  "KEGG" TEXT /* KEGG pathway ID */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biological type of the gene */,
  "len" INTEGER /* Length of the gene */,
  "chr" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "symbol" TEXT /*  Gene symbol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Gene description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, KEGG pathway) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was last updated */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Reference to the gene */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, KEGG pathway) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene annotation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene annotation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each GO term */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* GO term */,
  "go_description" TEXT /* Description of the GO term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the GO term record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kegg_pathways" (
  "kegg_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each KEGG pathway */,
  "kegg_pathway" TEXT /* KEGG pathway */,
  "kegg_description" TEXT /* Description of the KEGG pathway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the KEGG pathway record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the KEGG pathway record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kegg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_domains" (
  "domain_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each protein domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Protein domain */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Description of the protein domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein domain record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein domain record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)
